heroHeadline: BREAKING Day 40: Iran's SNSC Formally Accepts Two-Week Ceasefire; NATO Talks Convened Amid War Strains
heroSubtitle: Iran's Supreme National Security Council officially acknowledges ceasefire framework, halting active US-Israeli strikes. White House convenes NATO allies amid transatlantic fractures; Congressional Republicans set own Iran war deadline.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
